name: 4cup French Press Coffee Maker - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Enjoy richly flavored coffee at your own convenience with the 4-Cup French Press Coffee Maker from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This convenient and stylish manual French press coffeemaker is made of clear borosilicate glass so you can eye your brew the whole time. Designed with a side handle for comfortable carrying, it's the perfect gift for coffee lovers, friends, family or colleagues.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
